name: SCC_CreateSessionSetupReq_DIN
title: SCC_CreateSessionSetupReq_DIN
syntax: long SCC_CreateSessionSetupReq_DIN ( byte SessionID[], byte EVCCID[] )
description: Creates a Session Setup Request message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
